channel.title: Im a newbie, I need an example
channel.description: I want an example web tutorial made from start to finish? Can everyone share to me, thanks so much!

item.title: Im a newbie, I need an example
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @hongocthem

Welcome to the Frontity community. Great to know that you’re interested in trying Frontity.

We are currently working on a step-by-step tutorial, to add to our docs, that will take you from installation and first principles to a fully functioning site in a progressive fashion. That won’t be available for a few weeks yet. Meanwhile this guide will teach you how to build a Frontity theme from scratch and would be a good place for you to start.

In fact the step-by-step tutorial that we’re working on at the moment will be based on that guide and build upon it.

Hope that helps and do let us know how you get on and if that guide fits your needs.

Read full topic
item.source: Im a newbie, I need an example

item.title: Im a newbie, I need an example

item.description:
